content:
The other important symbol utilized to create these two themes is the journey Phoenix experiences to get her grandson’s medicine. It can be understood that this path is something she has gone through in the past in which each time she makes sacrifices for her loved ones. According to the passage, Eudora states, “She walked slowly, and with a little sob in her throat. She was very old, and very tired”. The sadness and exhaustion Phoenix goes through demonstrates that her sacrifices has had an impact on her emotional and physical wellbeing, and yet she continues to persevere through such hardships for the wellbeing of her loved ones.

All in all, the use of symbolism in this story establishes the themes of perseverance and sacrifice. Phoenix’s name and the path she goes through represent her dedication to her family, despite the challenges and hardships she encounters.

from Week 5 Discussion
Feb 4, 2025 9:39AM
Jennifer Thomas
Hi Ashley,

After reading your take on how Eudora Welty use symbolism in "A Worn Path" to convey themes of perseverance and sacrifice, I would like to mention that I standby your point completely. First of, the main character, Phoenix, is an old fragile women who has endured lots of hardships in the past and still is. Just like you depicted in your response, "Her eyes were blue with age. Her skin had a pattern all its own of numberless branching wrinkles". Yet she is determined to go through such lengths and all kinds of trial and tribulations throughout her journey for the wellbeing of her grandson. Basically she the type of individual willing to sacrifice everything, even her own health, for the goodness of the people she adores and cherishes in her life. Similar to the mythical creature called Phoenix, she also possesses the same qualities of that creature. No matter what challenge she may come across throughout her various journeys, she will never give up and back out. Rather, she will face it with great strength and courage, just like a phoenix would, and successfully go through with it until she reaches her goal. Due to these qualities Phoenix Jackson possesses,
